prompt: Create a vertical dark Eastern fantasy cinematic movie poster for Zhao Ling'er from Chinese paladin mythology, titled around the “Demon Locking Tower fateful night.” The central figure is a solemn young Chinese goddess-like woman standing waist-deep in black reflective water inside a ruined vertical abyss tower. Her face should be softly obscured or left featureless, but her posture is calm, fatalistic, and divine. She wears a faded jade-cyan translucent Hanfu-style ceremonial dress with wet gauze layers, flowing ribbons, beaded chains, silver ornaments, a circular pendant at the waist, wrist jewelry, and twin-bun black hair with long blue-green veils. One hand reaches down to touch the water, creating a glowing circular ripple spell. Surround her with ancient stone walls, huge hanging iron chains, broken wooden platforms, drifting talisman papers, circular Taoist seals, faint golden Chinese inscriptions, and a cold moonbeam falling from a broken opening high above. Add a shadowy demon face with red eyes half-hidden in the right background. The water surface should contain glowing arcane diagrams, sigils, dragon-scale textures, and submerged calligraphy. Use low-saturation cold gray-blue and faded jade tones, damp moonlight, mist, rain-wet stone, heavy shadows, and subtle gold accents. Make it look like a 3A game CG film poster, ultra-detailed, realistic, atmospheric, oppressive, quiet, sacred, ominous, with a sense of destiny and death premonition. Include exactly three main text blocks: large vertical Chinese title on the left reading 赵灵儿 with small English romanization “ZHAO LINGER” beneath it; a smaller vertical subtitle near the left reading 锁妖塔 女娲后裔·宿命之夜; and a vertical poetic quote on the right reading 若宿命终将吞没一切，愿仍有人记得，她曾在月光下安静站立。. Avoid modern fashion photography, influencer xianxia styling, anime illustration, bright colors, clean studio lighting, cute expressions, or plastic-looking costumes.
